---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a capability or improvement
title: "feat: "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What are you trying to do that the butler doesn't support today? Describe the situation, not a
pre-chosen solution — the underlying need is what matters.

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to see. If you're proposing a **new composed skill**, note the single dimension it
would own and why an existing skill can't cover it (see the
[Proposing a new composed skill](../../CONTRIBUTING.md) section in CONTRIBUTING.md).

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you weighed, and why they fall short. Include existing tools or skills that
partly solve this.

## Additional context

Scope, affected skills, docs that would need updating, or anything else.
